Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add WIP track: flush partial draw results every 5 methods

Two-track output system for bootstrap evaluation:
- Track 1 (unchanged): complete-draw snapshots (bootstrap_raw_*.csv + meta JSON)
- Track 2 (new): WIP files (.wip_*.csv + .wip_meta_*.json) updated every
  5 methods within the current draw, cleared when draw completes

This ensures partial per-method results are visible on disk even before
an entire draw finishes (~1-1.5h per draw with 58-208 methods).

feat: Migrate HR dashboard tables to DataTable (#94)

* feat: Migrate HR dashboard tables to DataTable

Migrate 4 HR dashboard tables from hand-built HTML to DataTable
(Shadcn Table + TanStack Table):

- asset-page-content: Row numbers, sortable columns, useCallback
  for handleRetire. External multi-field search preserved.
- compliance-dashboard: Reduced 7→5 columns (removed Issue Date,
  folded Reference into Document cell). Row numbers added.

  documentTypes array. StatusDot cells with tooltips preserved.

  Completed) into single DataTable with computed Priority column.
  Default sort by priority. Row numbers added.

All tables gain sortable column headers, pagination, sticky
headers, and consistent styling.

commit.message:
Increase trading frequency for active day trading

PROBLEM: Bot was trading 1-2x/day instead of 20-30x like pro day traders.

ROOT CAUSES FIXED:
1. Confidence thresholds too high (0.65-0.85 required, strategies produce 0.35-0.55)
2. Quality filters too strict (blocking 90% of signals)
3. Stop losses too wide (slow to cut losses)

CHANGES:
- Autonomous Engine: Lower thresholds to 0.45-0.55 (from 0.65-0.85)
- Default profile changed from "balanced" to "active"

- ORB Strategy: Base 0.50 (from 0.35), removed blocking volume filter
- Momentum: Base 0.50 (from 0.35), removed blocking filters
- EMA Cross: Base 0.50 (from 0.40), tighter 1.5 ATR stops
- VWAP Bounce: Volume threshold 1.0x (from 1.5x), wick 0.5% (from 2%)
- Breakout: Base 0.50 (from 0.40), volume threshold 1.0x (from 1.5x)

All strategies now use:
- Tighter stops (1.5 ATR instead of 2 ATR)
- Better risk/reward (1.67R+ targets)
- Higher base confidence that can reach thresholds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Login: redirect all users to app-launch after sign-in

Previously crew members went to driver-portal and admins to DASHBOARD_URL.
Now everyone goes through app-launch.php (splash → quiz → schedule).

feat(agents): add Accessibility Auditor agent with eval-first + skills workflow

Implement the 5th agent (2nd eval-first workflow) with WCAG 2.1 AA compliance
auditing for email HTML. Includes progressive disclosure SKILL.md with 4 L3
skill files, 10 synthetic test cases, 5-criteria binary judge, blueprint
integration with recovery router, and SKILL.md files for all 9 agents.

Key additions:
- Accessibility agent: schemas, prompt, service, blueprint node
- Eval framework: AccessibilityJudge, synthetic data, runner/judge_runner wiring
- Recovery router: routes accessibility QA failures to AccessibilityNode
- Campaign blueprint: accessibility route + QA loop-back (9→11 edges)
- SKILL.md progressive disclosure for all 9 agents (L1+L2 + L3 skill files)
- Handoff-to-memory bridge (handoff_memory.py) for cross-session persistence
- Agent context hooks, plans, and project documentation updates

commit.message:
Tighten ORB and Momentum strategy filters

ORB was triggering too easily compared to other strategies.
Now requires:
- Volume confirmation (>1.2x avg)
- Meaningful range size (>0.3% of price)
- Decisive breakout (>0.2% beyond range)
- Lower base confidence (0.40 -> 0.35)

Momentum now requires:
- Volume confirmation (>1.2x avg)
- Higher momentum threshold (2% min)
- Momentum acceleration in signal direction

This balances signal generation across strategies.

CSS (mowology-brand.css):

Major accuracy upgrade: 2026 AI detection knowledge + consensus scoring

- Switch back to claude-sonnet-4-6 (haiku was losing too many subtle signals)
- Completely rewrite image prompt: Flux/MJ v7/DALL-E 3 specific artifacts,
  biological signals, lens forensics, composition analysis
- Completely rewrite video prompt: Sora/Kling/Runway/HunyuanVideo/Pika signatures,
  biological motion (breathing, micro-tremors, eye movement), physics analysis
- Temporal diff: higher resolution (480x854), compute mean/std statistics per diff
  and pass as numeric context to Claude (mean <3 = suspicious near-zero = AI signal)

- Video prompt now references 2026 generator-specific tells by name

ゴールセクションと節税インパクトを大幅強化

- 対象年商を5,000万円に引き上げ、節税効果を年間300-600万円+長期500-2,000万円に拡大
- LEVEL 1-4の各段階をより具体的・実戦的な内容に深化
- 追加の節税手法: マイクロ法人スキーム、退職金1/2課税、簡易課税、
  投資促進税制、賃上げ税制、決算期変更、繰越欠損金
- 10年累計5,000万-1億円の機会損失インパクトを明示
- 全3エディション(RPG/Professional/Practical)で統一的に強化

Redesign UI with CustomTkinter for macOS-native Codex-style look

- Migrate from tkinter/ttk to CustomTkinter for rounded corners on all widgets
- Light gray sidebar + white rounded content panel (Codex-inspired layout)
- Apple system colors (#007AFF blue, SF Pro font)

commit.message:
feat: entity resolution — aliases + semantic embedding search

Adds two-tier entity resolution before Tier 1 memory retrieval:

1. Alias matching (exact name > exact alias > substring name > substring alias)
2. Embedding fallback — vector similarity search on entity embeddings via match_entities RPC

- lib/entity-resolver.ts: new resolveEntities() with full pipeline + [ENTITY RESOLUTION] logs
- lib/entities.ts: aliases[] added to types; merged on upsert; entity embedding generated on save
- lib/extractEntities.js: LLM schema updated to extract aliases automatically
- lib/ai-search.ts: inline name check replaced with resolveEntities()
- migrations/add_entity_aliases_embeddings.sql: adds aliases + embedding columns + match_entities RPC

feat: Migrate profile tab tables to DataTable (#93)

* feat: Migrate profile tab tables to DataTable component

Migrate the 3 simplest profile tables (assets, documents, absence)
from hand-built HTML tables to the TanStack DataTable component.

Key changes per table:
- profile-assets-tab: History table → DataTable with sortable Asset,
  Assigned, and Returned columns
- profile-documents-tab: Reduced from 7 to 5 columns — removed
  Issue Date, folded Reference into Document cell as subtitle
- profile-absence-tab: Reduced from 6 to 5 columns — folded Category
  into Type cell as subtitle, replaced useMemo sort with initialSorting

All tables gain sortable column headers, consistent styling via Shadcn
primitives, sticky headers, and hover states.

  standardisation entry

  migrating — fold sparse/secondary data into related cells

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: Address Gemini review feedback on PRs #92 and #93

PR #92 feedback:
- Enable three-state sort cycling (asc → desc → unsorted) by calling
  toggleSorting() without arguments instead of forcing two-state
- Add JSDoc memoisation notes on columns/data DataTable props

PR #93 feedback:
- Wrap handleVerify/handleDownload in useCallback to prevent stale
  closures in memoised column definitions

Also adds test for three-state sort cycling (numeric columns sort
descending first per TanStack Table default).

commit.message:
fix: security hardening, scrollbar fix, and bump version to 0.3.2

- Prevent prototype pollution via CSV headers (__proto__, constructor, prototype)
- Restrict SQL queries to SELECT-only, blocking DROP/DELETE/INSERT/UPDATE/etc.
- Add webview message origin validation and edit payload type/size checks
- Replace Math.random() nonce with crypto.randomBytes()
- Add localResourceRoots to restrict webview resource access
- Replace innerHTML with safe DOM methods in autocomplete
- Fix file descriptor leak in readRange() with try/finally
- Fix scrollbar not draggable due to error ruler intercepting pointer events
- Remove unused diagnostics collection
- Add *.vsix to .vscodeignore
- Resolve all npm audit vulnerabilities
- Add security regression test suite (81 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
4단계: 결제 계산 엔진 (PaymentCalculator) 추가

- app/services/payment_calculator.py: 계산 엔진 신규 생성
  · 수업 요일 기준 기간 내 주차 수 계산 (휴무 주 제외, 중간 합류 pro-rate)
  · 기본금액 = weekly_fee × weeks_charged
  · 분기 할인: payment_cycle='quarterly' 시 주당 -5,000원
  · 비율 할인: 형제자매 10% / 지인 20% / 직원 50% / 장학 100%
  · 이월/무료수업 차감: pending 조정 회차 × 회당 단가
  · PaymentCalculationResult DTO + to_dict() 반환
- app/models/course.py: CourseEnrollment에 discount_type 컬럼 추가
- migrate_discount_type.py: course_enrollments.discount_type 컬럼 마이그레이션
- app/admin/routes.py: 미리보기 API 2개 추가
  · GET  /admin/api/enrollment/<id>/calculate?period_id=xxx
  · POST /admin/api/enrollment/<id>/update-payment-info

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: move package from com.vauchi to app.vauchi

Align Kotlin package with reverse-domain of vauchi.app.
- com.vauchi.platform → app.vauchi.platform
- Maven groupId: com.vauchi → app.vauchi
- Android namespace: com.vauchi.mobile → app.vauchi.platform

commit.message:
fix: downgrade h3 to v1 (CJS) to resolve ERR_REQUIRE_ESM

h3 v2 is pure ESM and cannot be required in a CJS context.
Downgrade to h3@1.15.6 which ships CommonJS, and update
the API usage to match v1 (createApp, statusMessage, etc).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
notes: add interview prep notes for ByteDance and HarnessAgent

- ByteDance backend agent first interview: project-specific answers for
  auto-bug-migration ReAct Agent, deep-dive follow-up questions (Q8-Q20)
- HarnessAgent interview prep: 32 questions covering pipeline architecture,
  tool pool, fake definition detection, detailed related work comparison
  (OSS-Fuzz-Gen/LLM4FDG/Sherpa/PromptFuzz/CKGFuzzer), coverage measurement
  implementation (SanitizerCoverage inline-8bit-counters), and fuzzing basics
- Update .gitignore
